title: CoinDCX - Rekt
relevance_summary: Large-scale bridge exploit involving multiple chains and mixing protocols

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to untagged wallets within a certain timeframe after a large transfer

red_flags: Unexplained large transfers to untagged wallets
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds to untagged wallets within a certain timeframe after a large transfer
summary: CoinDCX lost $44.3 million to a bridge exploit involving multiple chains and mixing protocols. A guard could have detected and blocked the transfer to untagged wallets shortly after a large transfer.
